titleStmt.title: SII 27.148: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 148. (A.R. No. 528 of 1929-30.) ULLĀḶA, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the dilapidated Hanumān temple in the old fort.
This badly damaged record is dated Śaka 1396, Jaya, Siṁha 15, Sunday corresponding to 1474 A.D., August 14.

It seems to register a gift of land (?) by the haṁjamāna under certain conditions. It states that Viṭharasa-oḍeya was governing Maṅgalūru-Bārakūru-rājya under orders of mahā-pradhāna Siṁgaṇṇa-daṇāyka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trailōkya nagarā
raṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya sakhavaru
sa 1396 neya vartamāna jaya saṁvatsarada siṁhamāsa15neya Ādivā
radalu śrīmanmahā vīrapratāpa prahuḍha
śrīvirūpākṣa mahārā stira siṁhāsanārūḍha
rāgi cittaisutiralu mahāpradhāna siṁgaṇnadaṇnauyka
Oḍeyaru tiralu Avara nirūpadiṁda
viṭharasa Oḍeyaru maṁgalūru bārakūru rājyavanu pratipālisutta viruva
kāladali boṁ koṭhāradiṁda baḍaga kūḍiyiṁda teṁ
kaliha haṁjamānada śāsanadakramaveṁ
suṁka Ācāra Upahāra nūnavanu
sīme dō
ṇigaḷanu biṭṭiya hiḍiya salladu navage niṁmoḷaganyāya
vamāḍida Aṁgaḍi haṁjamānada varu
sahitāgimāgi bāḷibaharu Ācaṁ
drārkkastiravāgi niṁma saṁtāna saṁtāna paraṁpareyāgi bāḷabahari ba
rasi koṭṭa silāśāsanada pramāna da manuṣyaru
danū biṭṭiya hiḍiyasalladu kōṭiyiṁda teṁkaḷasīme bā
ḷa haṁjamānadavarige dalu naṁma manuśyaru saccarita
geya salladu muṭṭugoḷa hiḍiyasalladu nuḍiya kaṭṭa salladu haṁjama
nadavaru karayisi vicāra muṁtāgi Ādaḍe yikisi datiga
Ā gativamāḍi durāgatadali Usitadali bāḷisi baheU yeṁdu ba
rasi koṭṭa śilāśāsana yida Āru tappabāradu tappidavaru taṁmadaiva guru
vige tappidavaru yidakke tappidavarutaṁma tāyitaṁdege tappidavaru yi
śāsanada vakaṇige Āru Obbaru tappidavaru vāraṇāsiyadali sāvira kapileya
koṁda pāpakke hōharu yi śāsanada vakkaṇe Ārobbaru pālisidavaru vāra
ṇāsiyali sāvira kapileya dānava māḍida puṇyavanaiduvaru subhamastu
dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāchrēyōnu pālanaṁ . dānāśvargga mavāpnōti dānā
daccutaṁpadaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattā yō harēti vasuṁdhare saṣṭirvaruṣa śahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . subhamastu . śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.148 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
